steps.t: Rhiangar has asked for your help dismantling her father's bed so that it can be moved downstairs. The Mayor's bed is in the Mayor's home, in Herne.
You have dismantled the bed in the upstairs room of the Mayor's house. Now you should reassemble it downstairs, in his office. The Mayor's office is i…
You should let Rhiangar know that you have moved her father's bed into the library. Rhiangar is in the kitchen in the Mayor's house in Herne.
